name: python3-social-django
title: python3-social-django
summary: Django component of the python-social-auth ecosystem (Python3)
description:
Django component of the python-social-auth ecosystem (Python3)
Python Social Auth is an easy to setup social authentication/registration
mechanism with support for several frameworks and auth providers.
.
This is the Django component of the python-social-auth ecosystem, it
implements the needed functionality to integrate social-auth-core in a Django
based project.
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of the library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-social-django because Django component of the python-social-auth ecosystem (Python3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-social-django as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-social-django with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-social-django --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
